\tzpentry{ID4776}{Text Universe Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4776 introduces Text Universe Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\Delta S_{\\text{universe}} = \\frac{Q_{\\text{dissipated}}}{T} - \\Delta S_{\\text{system}} > 0\n\\end{equation}
